executives.name: Jim Umpleby
executives.background: Jim Umpleby is chairman of the board of directors and chief executive officer of Caterpillar Inc. He joined Solar Turbines, a Caterpillar subsidiary, in 1980 and has held numerous leadership roles within the company. He was appointed CEO in 2017 and Chairman in 2018.

executives.name: Andrew Bonfield
executives.background: Andrew Bonfield is chief financial officer of Caterpillar Inc. Before joining Caterpillar in 2018, he served as CFO of National Grid plc and held senior finance roles at Cadbury plc, Bristol-Myers Squibb, and SmithKline Beecham.

executives.name: Joseph Creed
executives.background: Joe Creed is president and chief operating officer of Caterpillar Inc. He joined the company in 1997 and has held various leadership positions in finance and operations, including serving as CFO of the Energy & Transportation segment.

executives.name: Cheryl Johnson
executives.background: Cheryl Johnson is chief human resources officer of Caterpillar Inc. She joined the company in 2017 from Textron Inc., where she served as vice president of human resources.

executives.name: Derek Owens
executives.background: Derek Owens is senior vice president and general counsel of Caterpillar Inc. He joined Caterpillar in 2019 and previously served as vice president and deputy general counsel.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary
Chief Legal Officer and General Counsel

executives.name: Daniel Dickinson
executives.background: Managing Partner of HCI Equity Partners.

executives.name: David Burritt
executives.background: President and CEO of United States Steel Corporation.

executives.name: David Calhoun
executives.background: Former President and CEO of The Boeing Company; former Executive Chairman of Nielsen Holdings plc.

executives.name: David MacLennan
executives.background: Former Executive Chair and CEO of Cargill, Inc.

executives.name: David Muilenburg
executives.background: Former CEO of Boeing. Note: This entry is for historical context as he is no longer on the board.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Debra Reed-Klages
executives.background: Former Executive Chairman, President and CEO of Sempra Energy.

executives.background: Executive Vice President, Global Manufacturing, General Motors Company.

executives.name: James Fish, Jr.
executives.background: President and CEO of Waste Management, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Jon Huntsman, Jr.
executives.background: Former U.S. Ambassador to Russia, China, and Singapore. Director since 2020.

executives.name: Judith Marks
executives.background: Chair, CEO and President of Otis Worldwide Corporation.

executives.name: Julie Lagacy
executives.background: Ms. Lagacy previously served as Chief Sustainability and Strategy Officer at Caterpillar Inc. She joined the board in 2023.

executives.name: Kelly Ayotte
executives.background: Former U.S. Senator for New Hampshire and former Attorney General of New Hampshire.

executives.name: Rayford Wilkins, Jr.
executives.background: Former CEO of Diversified Businesses of AT&T Inc.

executives.name: Stuart Levenick
executives.background: Former Group President of Caterpillar Inc. Lead Independent Director of Entergy.

executives.name: Susan Schwab
executives.background: Professor Emerita at the University of Maryland and former U.S. Trade Representative.
